description: capital and the largest city of Somalia
description_wiki: Mogadishu, locally known as Xamar or Hamar, is the capital and most populous city of Somalia.

description: civil war taking place in Somalia since 1991
description_wiki: The Somali Civil War (Somali: Dagaalkii Sokeeye ee Soomaaliya; Arabic: الحرب الأهلية الصومالية al-ḥarb al-’ahliyya aṣ-ṣūmāliyya) is an ongoing civil war that is taking place in Somalia.

description: country located primarily in North America
description_wiki: The United States of America (USA), also known as the United States (U.S.) or America, is a country primarily located in North America.

description: city in Missouri, United States, that is one of two county seats of Jackson County and the largest city in Missouri
description_wiki: Kansas City, abbreviated KC or KCMO, is the largest city in the U.S. state of Missouri by both population and area.

description: seat of San Diego County, California, United States; second-largest city in California
description_wiki: San Diego (  SAN dee-AY-goh; Spanish: [san ˈdjeɣo]) is a city on the Pacific coast of Southern California, adjacent to the Mexico–United States border.

description: city in Blue Earth County, Minnesota, USA
description_wiki: Mankato (  man-KAY-toh) is a city in Blue Earth, Nicollet, and Le Sueur counties in the U.S. state of Minnesota.

description: city in Hennepin County, Minnesota, United States
description_wiki: Eden Prairie is a city in Hennepin County, Minnesota, United States.

description: public research university in Minneapolis and Saint Paul, Minnesota, United States
description_wiki: The University of Minnesota Twin Cities (historically known as University of Minnesota) is a public land-grant research university in the Twin Cities of Minneapolis and Saint Paul, Minnesota, United States.

description: city in and seat of Hennepin County, and largest city in State of Minnesota, United States
description_wiki: Minneapolis is a city in Hennepin County, Minnesota, United States, and its county seat.
